questionHtml: Suggest why the titration must be conducted quickly even though a low temperature is maintained.
markschemeHtml:
equilibrium shifts to left
OR
more ethanoic acid is produced «as ethanoic acid is neutralized»
OR
prevents/slows down ester hydrolysis ✔

Accept “prevents equilibrium shift” if described correctly without direction.

meta.title: Suggest why the titration must be conducted quickly even though a low temperature is maintained.
